/usr/bin/ar qc libmagpie_core.a  CMakeFiles/magpie_core.dir/src/utils/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/magpie_core.dir/src/utils/common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/magpie_core.dir/src/frames/frame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/magpie_core.dir/src/frames/primitive_frames.cpp.o CMakeFiles/magpie_core.dir/src/serializer/msgpack_serializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/magpie_core.dir/src/transport/stream_writer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/magpie_core.dir/src/transport/stream_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/magpie_core.dir/src/transport/zmq/zmq_publisher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/magpie_core.dir/src/transport/zmq/zmq_subscriber.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libmagpie_core.a
